scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Divya? I hope I'm not disturbing you at a bad time?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi... yes, this is Divya. Actually I was just studying, but it's okay.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's great to hear you're studying! I won't take much of your time. I'm calling because you showed interest in our JEE courses. Can you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in class 11... but I'm just exploring options right now, not really ready to decide anything yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, exploring is important! Class 11 is actually the perfect time to start serious JEE preparation. So you're targeting JEE Main, right? When are you planning to appear for the exam?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, JEE Main... I think in 2027. But honestly, I'm not sure about coaching yet. There are so many options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, I understand the confusion. JEE 2027 means you have almost 20 months - that's actually a good timeline! At PW, we have JEE Lakshya 2027 and JEE Arjuna 2027 specifically for students like you. Have you looked at any online courses before?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Not really... I mean, I've heard about online coaching but I'm not convinced it works as well as offline. Also, my parents haven't decided on the budget yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's a valid concern! Many parents initially think the same. Our courses are designed to be as effective as offline coaching but more affordable. JEE Arjuna 2027 is just ₹19,999 - that's ₹1,999 per month EMI. Even JEE Lakshya with premium features is ₹35,999. Do you think this range works for your family?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I... I'm not sure. I'll have to discuss with my parents first. They handle all the financial decisions. Can you call back later?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! I completely understand - these are important family decisions. Before I call back, can you tell me what specific concerns you or your parents might have? Is it about the online format, the pricing, or something else?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Well... my parents are worried about online classes being effective. And they want to compare with local coaching institutes in Thiruvananthapuram first.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That makes perfect sense! Local comparison is important. You know what, let me share some demo classes with you so you can experience our teaching quality firsthand. When would be a good time to call you back after you've discussed with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe... in a week? I need time to show them the demos and discuss properly. Is that okay?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! One week is perfect. I'll send you the demo links on WhatsApp today itself. Should I call you next Friday around this same time? And just confirm - this number is the best way to reach you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, next Friday works. And yes, this number is fine. Thank you for understanding that I need to discuss with my parents first.
